observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with mechanical deformation
Visual pattern suggesting bent grid element
Localized deviation from normal grid appearance
mechanism_explanation: Force applied exceeds the material's elastic limit, causing permanent shape change.
severity_visual_description: moderate bent grid element visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Reduce forming pressure and verify die alignment.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the bent grid element would be absent and surface appears normal.
